product.title: Squad Dunk
product.description: Squad Dunk is a physics-based first-person basketball game. Team up with friends for casual or competitive matches. No auto-aim. Every play, good or terrible, is yours. Ready to make basketball physical?
product.history: Squad Dunk is basketball built around physics. Each player controls one character on the court, teaming up with friends in casual or competitive online matches across courts with their own twists. No auto-aim, every play, good or terrible, is yours.

features.feature: Physics-based shots, passes, steals, and rebounds
Simple to start, plenty of room to improve
Different courts and scenarios, each with its own twist
An unpaid referee in constant danger

product.development: In active development by Katapult Games.
product.developers: Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini and Anahi Mou
product.short-description: Squad Dunk is a physics-based first-person basketball game. Team up with friends for casual or competitive matches. No auto-aim. Every play, good or terrible, is yours. Ready to make basketball physical?

long-descriptions.long-description: Squad Dunk is basketball built around physics. Each player controls one character on the court, teaming up with friends in casual or competitive online matches across courts with their own twists. No auto-aim, every play, good or terrible, is yours.

key-feature.title: PLAY FROM THE COURT
key-feature.body: Control one player in first person and experience the match from inside the action, not from a distant camera.

key-feature.title: FEEL THE PHYSICS
key-feature.body: Squad Dunk uses physics-based mechanics to make basketball feel more alive, physical, and unpredictable. Blocks, shots, steals, rebounds, movement, and contact all become part of the moment.

key-feature.title: PLAY AS A TEAM
key-feature.body: Play solo or with friends in casual or competitive matches. Team up, give your squad a leg up, literally, and go for the kind of plays normal basketball would keep illegal, turning questionable ideas into real plays.

key-feature.title: EVERY COURT CHANGES THE GAME
key-feature.body: Each court adds its own twist, with new mechanics and environments that make teams adapt in different ways.

key-feature.title: CUSTOMIZE YOUR CHARACTER
key-feature.body: Create your look, build your squad identity, and give your team its own style.

product.localization-json:

Blocks, shots, steals, rebounds, movement, and contact all become part of the moment."},{"icon":"","title":"PLAY AS A TEAM","body":"Play solo or with friends in casual or competitive matches. Team up, give your squad a leg up, literally, and go for the kind of plays normal basketball would keep illegal, turning questionable ideas into real plays."},{"icon":"","title":"EVERY COURT CHANGES THE GAME","body":"Each court adds its own twist, with new mechanics and environments that make teams adapt in different ways."},{"icon":"","title":"CUSTOMIZE YOUR CHARACTER","body":"Create your look, build your squad identity, and give your team its own style."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Home","about":"About","press":"Press"},"eyebrow":"Gameplay Reel","tagline":"Physics-based first-person basketball. Steam"]},"features":{"title":"Features","items":["First-person view","Physics-based shots, passes, steals, and rebounds","Up to 3 players per team","Simple to start, plenty of room to improve","Different courts and scenarios, each with its own twist","Character and team customization","An unpaid referee in constant danger"]},"media":{"title":"Media","videos":"Videos","screenshots":"Screenshots","download":"download press kit as .rar","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Physics-based first-person basketball gameplay preview.","label":"Watch on YouTube"},{"title":"Reveal Trailer","description":"Coming soon.","label":"Coming soon"}]},"branding":{"title":"Branding","download":"download logo files as .zip"},"links":{"title":"Links"},"team":{"title":"Team","about_title":"About Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"About","boilerplate":"A small indie video game studio based in Berlin.
We are Katapult Games and we build games with our community, not just for them. Driven by transparency, flexibility and a love for modern gaming trends, our mission is to create high energy multiplayer experiences that truly connect with players. We don't just want you to play our games, we want you to help us shape them. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Team","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Contact","email":"Email","bug_reports":"Bug Reports"}}},"es":{"description":{"heading":"¿QUÉ ES SQUAD DUNK?","short":{"title":"DESCRIPCIÓN CORTA","text":"Squad Dunk es un juego de básquetbol en primera persona basado en físicas. Forma equipo con amigos para partidas casuales o competitivas. Sin autoapuntado. Cada jugada, buena o terrible, es tuya. ¿Listo para hacer que el básquetbol se sienta físico?"},"long":{"title":"DESCRIPCIÓN LARGA","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk es básquetbol construido alrededor de la física. Cada jugador controla un personaje en la cancha y forma equipo con amigos en partidas online casuales o competitivas, en canchas con sus propios giros. Sin autoapuntado: cada jugada, buena o terrible, es tuya."]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"Características principales","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"JUEGA DESDE LA CANCHA","body":"Controla a un jugador en primera persona y vive el partido desde dentro de la acción, no desde una cámara distante."},{"icon":"","title":"SIENTE LA FÍSICA","body":"Squad Dunk usa mecánicas basadas en físicas para que el básquetbol se sienta más vivo, físico e impredecible. Bloqueos, tiros, robos, rebotes, movimiento y contacto forman parte de cada momento."},{"icon":"","title":"JUEGA EN EQUIPO","body":"Juega solo o con amigos en partidas casuales o competitivas. Coordínense y conviertan ideas cuestionables en jugadas reales."},{"icon":"","title":"CADA CANCHA CAMBIA EL JUEGO","body":"Cada cancha suma su propio giro, con mecánicas y entornos que obligan a los equipos a adaptarse de distintas maneras."},{"icon":"","title":"PERSONALIZA TU PERSONAJE","body":"Crea tu apariencia, construye la identidad de tu squad y dale un estilo propio a tu equipo."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Inicio","about":"Acerca de","press":"Prensa"},"eyebrow":"Reel de gameplay","tagline":"Básquetbol en primera persona basado en físicas. Sin autoapuntado. Cada jugada es tuya.","play":"Ver reel de gameplay","close":"Cerrar video","fallback":"Abrir en YouTube","press_kit_cta":"Press Kit"},"nav":{"language":"Idioma","menu":"Menú","sections":{"factsheet":"Ficha técnica","description":"Descripción","features":"Características","media":"Medios","branding":"Marca","links":"Enlaces","team":"Equipo","contact":"Contacto"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Ficha técnica","labels":{"about":"Acerca de:","developer":"Desarrollador:","development":"Desarrollo:","developers":"Desarrolladores:","publisher":"Publisher:","release_date":"Fecha de lanzamiento:","genres":"Géneros:","platforms":"Plataformas:","cost":"Precio:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"Tráiler:","preview":"Pre-view:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"Sitio web:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"En desarrollo activo por Katapult Games.","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini y Anahi Mou","based_in":"Basado en Berlín, Alemania","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/4591520/Squad_Dunk/","trailer":"TBA","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"Abrir Press Kit"},"release_dates":["TBA"],"genres_items":["Básquetbol","Deportes","Multijugador","PvP","Primera persona","Arcade","Físicas","Basado en equipos","Indie","Primera persona","Basado en físicas","PvP online"],"platforms_items":["PC - Steam"]},"features":{"title":"Características","items":["Vista en primera persona","Tiros, pases, robos y rebotes basados en físicas","Hasta 3 jugadores por equipo","Fácil de empezar, con mucho espacio para mejorar","Distintas canchas y escenarios, cada uno con su propio giro","Personalización de personaje y equipo","Un árbitro no remunerado en peligro constante"]},"media":{"title":"Medios","videos":"Videos","screenshots":"Capturas","download":"descargar press kit como .rar","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Preview de gameplay de básquetbol en primera persona basado en físicas.","label":"Ver en YouTube"},{"title":"Reveal Trailer","description":"Próximamente.","label":"Próximamente"}]},"branding":{"title":"Marca","download":"descargar logos como .zip"},"links":{"title":"Enlaces"},"team":{"title":"Equipo","about_title":"Acerca de Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"Acerca de","boilerplate":"Un pequeño estudio indie de videojuegos basado en Berlín.
Somos Katapult Games y hacemos juegos con nuestra comunidad, no solo para ella. Impulsados por la transparencia, la flexibilidad y el amor por las tendencias actuales del gaming, nuestra misión es crear experiencias multijugador de alta energía que conecten de verdad con los jugadores. No queremos que solo juegues nuestros juegos: queremos que nos ayudes a darles forma. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Equipo","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Contacto","email":"Email","bug_reports":"Reportar bugs"}}},"ru":{"description":{"heading":"ЧТО ТАКОЕ SQUAD DUNK?","short":{"title":"КРАТКОЕ ОПИСАНИЕ","text":"Squad Dunk — это баскетбол от первого лица на основе физики. Объединяйтесь с друзьями для казуальных или соревновательных матчей. Без автонаведения. Каждая удачная или ужасная игра — ваша. Готовы сделать баскетбол по-настоящему физическим?"},"long":{"title":"ПОДРОБНОЕ ОПИСАНИЕ","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk — это баскетбол, построенный вокруг физики. Каждый игрок управляет одним персонажем на площадке и играет с друзьями в казуальных или соревновательных онлайн-матчах на площадках со своими особенностями. Без автонаведения: каждая удачная или ужасная игра — ваша."]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"Ключевые особенности","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"ИГРАЙТЕ С ПЛОЩАДКИ","body":"Управляйте одним игроком от первого лица и переживайте матч изнутри действия, а не с далекой камеры."},{"icon":"","title":"ЧУВСТВУЙТЕ ФИЗИКУ","body":"Физические механики делают баскетбол более живым, контактным и непредсказуемым. Блоки, броски, перехваты, подборы, движение и столкновения становятся частью каждого момента."},{"icon":"","title":"ИГРАЙТЕ КОМАНДОЙ","body":"Играйте в одиночку или с друзьями в казуальных и соревновательных матчах. Действуйте вместе и превращайте сомнительные идеи в реальные игровые моменты."},{"icon":"","title":"КАЖДАЯ ПЛОЩАДКА МЕНЯЕТ ИГРУ","body":"Каждая площадка добавляет собственный поворот: новые механики и окружение заставляют команды адаптироваться по-разному."},{"icon":"","title":"НАСТРОЙТЕ ПЕРСОНАЖА","body":"Создайте свой образ, сформируйте стиль своей команды и дайте ей собственную идентичность."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Главная","about":"Об игре","press":"Пресса"},"eyebrow":"Геймплейный ролик","tagline":"Баскетбол от первого лица на основе физики. Без автонаведения. Каждая игра — ваша.","play":"Смотреть геймплейный ролик","close":"Закрыть видео","fallback":"Открыть на YouTube","press_kit_cta":"Press Kit"},"nav":{"language":"Язык","menu":"Меню","sections":{"factsheet":"Факты","description":"Описание","features":"Особенности","media":"Медиа","branding":"Брендинг","links":"Ссылки","team":"Команда","contact":"Контакты"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Факты","labels":{"about":"Об игре:","developer":"Разработчик:","development":"Разработка:","developers":"Разработчики:","publisher":"Издатель:","release_date":"Дата выхода:","genres":"Жанры:","platforms":"Платформы:","cost":"Цена:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"Трейлер:","preview":"Pre-view:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"Сайт:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"В активной разработке Katapult Games.","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini and Anahi Mou","based_in":"Базируется в Берлине, Германия","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/4591520/Squad_Dunk/","trailer":"TBA","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"Открыть Press Kit"},"release_dates":["TBA"],"genres_items":["Баскетбол","Спорт","Мультиплеер","PvP","От первого лица","Аркада","Физика","Командная игра","Инди","От первого лица","На основе физики","Онлайн PvP"],"platforms_items":["PC - Steam"]},"features":{"title":"Особенности","items":["Вид от первого лица","Физические броски, передачи, перехваты и подборы","До 3 игроков в команде","Легко начать, есть куда расти","Разные площадки и сценарии, каждый со своим поворотом","Настройка персонажа и команды","Неоплачиваемый судья в постоянной опасности"]},"media":{"title":"Медиа","videos":"Видео","screenshots":"Скриншоты","download":"скачать press kit в формате .rar","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Геймплейный превью-ролик баскетбола от первого лица на основе физики.","label":"Смотреть на YouTube"},{"title":"Reveal Trailer","description":"Скоро.","label":"Скоро"}]},"branding":{"title":"Брендинг","download":"скачать файлы логотипа в формате .zip"},"links":{"title":"Ссылки"},"team":{"title":"Команда","about_title":"О Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"О студии","boilerplate":"Небольшая инди-студия видеоигр из Берлина.
Мы Katapult Games, и мы создаем игры вместе с нашим сообществом, а не только для него. Наша работа строится на прозрачности, гибкости и любви к современным игровым трендам. Наша цель — создавать энергичные мультиплеерные проекты, которые действительно объединяют игроков. Мы хотим, чтобы вы не просто играли в наши игры, а помогали нам их формировать. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Команда","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Контакты","email":"Email","bug_reports":"Сообщить о баге"}}},"ja":{"description":{"heading":"SQUAD DUNKとは？","short":{"title":"ショート説明","text":"Squad Dunkは、物理ベースの一人称視点バスケットボールゲームです。友達とチームを組み、カジュアルまたは競技的な試合を楽しめます。オートエイムはありません。良いプレイもひどいプレイも、すべてあなた自身のものです。バスケットボールをもっとフィジカルにする準備はできていますか？"},"long":{"title":"ロング説明","paragraphs":["Squad Dunkは、物理を中心に作られたバスケットボールです。各プレイヤーはコート上の1人のキャラクターを操作し、友達とチームを組んで、それぞれ独自の仕掛けを持つコートでカジュアルまたは競技的なオンラインマッチをプレイします。オートエイムはありません。良いプレイもひどいプレイも、すべてあなた自身のものです。"]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"主な特徴","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"コートの中からプレイ","body":"遠くのカメラではなく、一人称視点で1人の選手を操作し、アクションの内側から試合を体験します。"},{"icon":"","title":"物理を感じる","body":"物理ベースのメカニクスにより、ブロック、シュート、スティール、リバウンド、移動、接触のすべてが、その瞬間のプレイに影響します。"},{"icon":"","title":"チームでプレイ","body":"ソロでも友達とでも、カジュアルまたは競技的な試合を遊べます。チームを組み、普通のバスケットボールなら反則になりそうなアイデアを本物のプレイに変えましょう。"},{"icon":"","title":"コートごとにゲームが変わる","body":"それぞれのコートには独自の仕掛け、メカニクス、環境があり、チームは状況に合わせてプレイを変える必要があります。"},{"icon":"","title":"キャラクターをカスタマイズ","body":"自分の見た目を作り、スクワッドの個性を築き、チーム独自のスタイルを与えましょう。"}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"ホーム","about":"概要","press":"プレス"},"eyebrow":"ゲームプレイリール","tagline":"物理ベースの一人称視点バスケットボール。オートエイムなし。すべてのプレイはあなたのもの。","play":"ゲームプレイリールを見る","close":"動画を閉じる","fallback":"YouTubeで開く","press_kit_cta":"Press Kit"},"nav":{"language":"言語","menu":"メニュー","sections":{"factsheet":"ファクトシート","description":"説明","features":"特徴","media":"メディア","branding":"ブランディング","links":"リンク","team":"チーム","contact":"連絡先"}},"factsheet":{"title":"ファクトシート","labels":{"about":"概要:","developer":"開発:","development":"開発状況:","developers":"開発者:","publisher":"パブリッシャー:","release_date":"発売日:","genres":"ジャンル:","platforms":"プラットフォーム:","cost":"価格:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"トレーラー:","preview":"プレビュー:","press_kit":"プレスキット:","website":"ウェブサイト:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"Katapult Gamesが現在開発中。","developers":"Bruno Braghetto、Matias Nicolini、Anahi Mou","based_in":"ドイツ・ベルリン拠点","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/4591520/Squad_Dunk/","trailer":"TBA","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"プレスキットリンクはこちら"},"release_dates":["TBA"],"genres_items":["バスケットボール","スポーツ","マルチプレイヤー","PvP","一人称視点","アーケード","物理","チームベース","インディー","一人称視点","物理ベース","オンラインPvP"],"platforms_items":["PC - Steam"]},"features":{"title":"特徴","items":["一人称視点","物理ベースのシュート、パス、スティール、リバウンド","1チーム最大3人","始めやすく、上達の余地がたっぷり","それぞれ独自の仕掛けを持つさまざまなコートとシナリオ","キャラクターとチームのカスタマイズ","常に危険にさらされる無給の審判"]},"media":{"title":"メディア","videos":"動画","screenshots":"スクリーンショット","download":"プレスキットを.rarでダウンロード","video_cards":[{"title":"プレビュー","description":"物理ベースの一人称視点バスケットボールのゲームプレイプレビュー。","label":"YouTubeで見る"},{"title":"リビールトレーラー","description":"近日公開。","label":"近日公開"}]},"branding":{"title":"ブランディング","download":"ロゴファイルを.zipでダウンロード"},"links":{"title":"リンク"},"team":{"title":"チーム","about_title":"Katapult Gamesについて","boilerplate_title":"概要","boilerplate":"ベルリンを拠点とする小さなインディーゲームスタジオです。
私たちはKatapult Gamesです。私たちはコミュニティのためだけでなく、コミュニティと一緒にゲームを作ります。透明性、柔軟性、現代のゲームトレンドへの愛を大切にし、プレイヤーと本当に繋がる高エネルギーなマルチプレイヤー体験を目指しています。私たちはただ遊んでもらうだけでなく、一緒に形作ってほしいと考えています。Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"チーム","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"連絡先","email":"メール","bug_reports":"バグ報告"}}},"zh":{"description":{"heading":"SQUAD DUNK 是什么？","short":{"title":"简短介绍","text":"Squad Dunk 是一款基于物理的第一人称篮球游戏。你可以和朋友组队，进行休闲或竞技比赛。没有自动瞄准。每一次精彩或糟糕的发挥，都由你自己完成。准备好让篮球更有身体对抗感了吗？"},"long":{"title":"详细介绍","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk 是围绕物理互动打造的篮球游戏。每位玩家控制球场上的一个角色，与朋友组队，在拥有不同变化的球场中进行休闲或竞技在线比赛。没有自动瞄准：每一次精彩或糟糕的发挥，都由你自己完成。"]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"核心特色","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"从球场内部开始比赛","body":"以第一人称控制一名球员，从球场内部体验传球、抢断、投篮和防守，而不是从远处俯视比赛。"},{"icon":"","title":"感受物理互动","body":"Squad Dunk 使用基于物理的机制，让篮球更鲜活、更有身体感，也更不可预测。盖帽、投篮、抢断、篮板、移动和碰撞都会成为比赛的一部分。"},{"icon":"","title":"团队配合","body":"你可以单人游玩，也可以和朋友一起进行休闲或竞技比赛。协作配合，把看似离谱的想法变成真实可行的战术。"},{"icon":"","title":"每个球场都会改变比赛","body":"每个球场都有自己的变化、机制和环境，迫使队伍用不同方式适应局势。"},{"icon":"","title":"自定义你的角色","body":"打造自己的外观，建立队伍身份，让你的队伍拥有独特风格。"}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"首页","about":"关于","press":"媒体"},"eyebrow":"游戏玩法视频","tagline":"基于物理的第一人称篮球。没有自动瞄准。每一次发挥都属于你。","play":"观看游戏玩法视频","close":"关闭视频","fallback":"在 YouTube 打开","press_kit_cta":"Press Kit"},"nav":{"language":"语言","menu":"菜单","sections":{"factsheet":"信息概览","description":"游戏介绍","features":"特色","media":"媒体","branding":"品牌素材","links":"链接","team":"团队","contact":"联系方式"}},"factsheet":{"title":"信息概览","labels":{"about":"关于:","developer":"开发商:","development":"开发状态:","developers":"开发者:","publisher":"发行商:","release_date":"发行日期:","genres":"类型:","platforms":"平台:","cost":"价格:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"预告片:","preview":"Pre-view:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"网站:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"由 Katapult Games 积极开发中。","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini and Anahi Mou","based_in":"位于德国柏林","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/4591520/Squad_Dunk/","trailer":"TBA","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"打开 Press Kit"},"release_dates":["TBA"],"genres_items":["篮球","体育","多人游戏","PvP","第一人称","街机","物理","团队制","独立游戏","第一人称","基于物理","在线 PvP"],"platforms_items":["PC - Steam"]},"features":{"title":"特色","items":["第一人称视角","基于物理的投篮、传球、抢断和篮板","每队最多 3 名玩家","容易上手，也有足够的提升空间","多种球场和场景，每个都有自己的变化","角色和队伍自定义","一名长期处于危险中的无薪裁判"]},"media":{"title":"媒体","videos":"视频","screenshots":"截图","download":"下载 .rar 格式 press kit","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"基于物理的第一人称篮球游戏玩法预览。","label":"在 YouTube 观看"},{"title":"Reveal Trailer","description":"即将公开。","label":"即将公开"}]},"branding":{"title":"品牌素材","download":"下载 .zip 格式 Logo 文件"},"links":{"title":"链接"},"team":{"title":"团队","about_title":"关于 Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"关于","boilerplate":"一个位于柏林的小型独立游戏工作室。
我们是 Katapult Games，我们不是只为社区制作游戏，而是与社区一起制作游戏。我们重视透明、灵活和现代游戏趋势，目标是打造真正连接玩家的高能多人体验。我们不只希望你玩我们的游戏，也希望你帮助我们一起塑造它们。Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"团队","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"联系方式","email":"Email","bug_reports":"提交 Bug"}}},"de":{"description":{"heading":"WAS IST SQUAD DUNK?","short":{"title":"KURZBESCHREIBUNG","text":"Squad Dunk ist ein physikbasiertes First-Person-Basketballspiel. Spiele mit Freundinnen und Freunden in lockeren oder kompetitiven Matches. Kein Auto-Aim. Jeder Spielzug, gut oder katastrophal, gehört dir. Bereit, Basketball körperlicher zu machen?"},"long":{"title":"LANGE BESCHREIBUNG","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk ist Basketball, der rund um Physik gebaut ist. Jede Person steuert einen Charakter auf dem Court und spielt mit Freundinnen und Freunden in lockeren oder kompetitiven Online-Matches auf Courts mit eigenen Twists. Kein Auto-Aim, jeder Spielzug, gut oder katastrophal, gehört dir."]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"Hauptfeatures","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"SPIEL DIREKT VOM COURT","body":"Steuere einen Spieler in der First-Person-Perspektive und erlebe das Match mitten aus der Action heraus, nicht aus einer entfernten Kamera."},{"icon":"","title":"SPÜRE DIE PHYSIK","body":"Physikbasierte Mechaniken machen Basketball lebendiger, körperlicher und unvorhersehbarer. Blocks, Würfe, Steals, Rebounds, Bewegung und Kontakt werden Teil jedes Moments."},{"icon":"","title":"SPIEL ALS TEAM","body":"Spiele solo oder mit Freundinnen und Freunden in lockeren oder kompetitiven Matches. Arbeitet zusammen und verwandelt fragwürdige Ideen in echte Spielzüge."},{"icon":"","title":"JEDER COURT VERÄNDERT DAS SPIEL","body":"Jeder Court bringt eigene Twists, Mechaniken und Umgebungen mit, an die sich Teams auf unterschiedliche Weise anpassen müssen."},{"icon":"","title":"PASSE DEINEN CHARAKTER AN","body":"Erstelle deinen Look, baue eine Squad-Identität auf und gib deinem Team einen eigenen Stil."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Home","about":"Über das Spiel","press":"Presse"},"eyebrow":"Gameplay-Reel","tagline":"Physikbasierter First-Person-Basketball. Kein Auto-Aim. Jeder Spielzug gehört dir.","play":"Gameplay-Reel ansehen","close":"Video schließen","fallback":"Auf YouTube öffnen","press_kit_cta":"Press Kit"},"nav":{"language":"Sprache","menu":"Menü","sections":{"factsheet":"Factsheet","description":"Beschreibung","features":"Features","media":"Medien","branding":"Branding","links":"Links","team":"Team","contact":"Kontakt"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Factsheet","labels":{"about":"Über:","developer":"Entwickler:","development":"Entwicklung:","developers":"Entwickler:","publisher":"Publisher:","release_date":"Veröffentlichung:","genres":"Genres:","platforms":"Plattformen:","cost":"Preis:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"Trailer:","preview":"Pre-view:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"Website:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"In aktiver Entwicklung bei Katapult Games.","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini und Anahi Mou","based_in":"Sitz in Berlin, Deutschland","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/4591520/Squad_Dunk/","trailer":"TBA","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"Hier zum Press-Kit-Link"},"release_dates":["TBA"],"genres_items":["Basketball","Sport","Multiplayer","PvP","First-Person","Arcade","Physik","Teambasiert","Indie","First-Person","Physikbasiert","Online-PvP"],"platforms_items":["PC - Steam"]},"features":{"title":"Features","items":["First-Person-Perspektive","Physikbasierte Würfe, Pässe, Steals und Rebounds","Bis zu 3 Spielerinnen und Spieler pro Team","Leicht zu starten, mit viel Raum zur Verbesserung","Verschiedene Courts und Szenarien, jeweils mit eigenem Twist","Charakter- und Team-Anpassung","Ein unbezahlter Schiedsrichter in ständiger Gefahr"]},"media":{"title":"Medien","videos":"Videos","screenshots":"Screenshots","download":"Press Kit als .rar herunterladen","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Physikbasierte First-Person-Basketball-Gameplay-Preview.","label":"Auf YouTube ansehen"},{"title":"Reveal-Trailer","description":"Bald verfügbar.","label":"Bald verfügbar"}]},"branding":{"title":"Branding","download":"Logodateien als .zip herunterladen"},"links":{"title":"Links"},"team":{"title":"Team","about_title":"Über Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"Über uns","boilerplate":"Ein kleines Indie-Videospielstudio mit Sitz in Berlin.
Wir sind Katapult Games und wir entwickeln Spiele mit unserer Community, nicht nur für sie. Angetrieben von Transparenz, Flexibilität und einer Liebe für moderne Gaming-Trends wollen wir energiegeladene Multiplayer-Erlebnisse schaffen, die Spielerinnen und Spieler wirklich verbinden. Wir möchten nicht nur, dass ihr unsere Spiele spielt, sondern dass ihr helft, sie mitzugestalten. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Team","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Kontakt","email":"E-Mail","bug_reports":"Bug Reports"}}},"fr":{"description":{"heading":"QU'EST-CE QUE SQUAD DUNK ?","short":{"title":"DESCRIPTION COURTE","text":"Squad Dunk est un jeu de basket en première personne basé sur la physique. Faites équipe avec vos amis pour des matchs casual ou compétitifs. Pas d'auto-aim. Chaque action, brillante ou désastreuse, est la vôtre. Prêt à rendre le basket vraiment physique ?"},"long":{"title":"DESCRIPTION LONGUE","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk est un jeu de basket construit autour de la physique. Chaque joueur contrôle un personnage sur le terrain et fait équipe avec ses amis dans des matchs en ligne casual ou compétitifs, sur des terrains qui ont chacun leurs propres twists. Pas d'auto-aim : chaque action, brillante ou désastreuse, est la vôtre."]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"Points clés","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"JOUEZ DEPUIS LE TERRAIN","body":"Contrôlez un joueur en première personne et vivez le match depuis l'intérieur de l'action, pas depuis une caméra éloignée."},{"icon":"","title":"RESSENTEZ LA PHYSIQUE","body":"Squad Dunk utilise des mécaniques basées sur la physique pour rendre le basket plus vivant, plus physique et plus imprévisible. Contres, tirs, interceptions, rebonds, mouvements et contacts font partie de chaque moment."},{"icon":"","title":"JOUEZ EN ÉQUIPE","body":"Jouez en solo ou avec des amis dans des matchs casual ou compétitifs. Coopérez et transformez des idées discutables en vraies actions de jeu."},{"icon":"","title":"CHAQUE TERRAIN CHANGE LE JEU","body":"Chaque terrain ajoute son propre twist, avec des mécaniques et des environnements qui obligent les équipes à s'adapter."},{"icon":"","title":"PERSONNALISEZ VOTRE PERSONNAGE","body":"Créez votre look, construisez l'identité de votre squad et donnez un style propre à votre équipe."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Accueil","about":"À propos","press":"Presse"},"eyebrow":"Vidéo de gameplay","tagline":"Basket en première personne basé sur la physique. Pas d'auto-aim. Chaque action est la vôtre.","play":"Regarder le gameplay reel","close":"Fermer la vidéo","fallback":"Ouvrir sur YouTube","press_kit_cta":"Press Kit"},"nav":{"language":"Langue","menu":"Menu","sections":{"factsheet":"Factsheet","description":"Description","features":"Fonctionnalités","media":"Médias","branding":"Identité visuelle","links":"Liens","team":"Équipe","contact":"Contact"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Factsheet","labels":{"about":"À propos :","developer":"Développeur :","development":"Développement :","developers":"Développeurs :","publisher":"Éditeur :","release_date":"Date de sortie :","genres":"Genres :","platforms":"Plateformes :","cost":"Prix :","steam":"Steam :","trailer":"Trailer :","preview":"Pre-view :","press_kit":"Press Kit :","website":"Site web :"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"En développement actif chez Katapult Games.","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini et Anahi Mou","based_in":"Basé à Berlin, Allemagne","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/4591520/Squad_Dunk/","trailer":"TBA","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"Ouvrir le Press Kit"},"release_dates":["TBA"],"genres_items":["Basket","Sport","Multijoueur","PvP","Première personne","Arcade","Physique","En équipe","Indie","Première personne","Basé sur la physique","PvP en ligne"],"platforms_items":["PC - Steam"]},"features":{"title":"Fonctionnalités","items":["Vue à la première personne","Tirs, passes, interceptions et rebonds basés sur la physique","Jusqu'à 3 joueurs par équipe","Facile à prendre en main, avec une vraie marge de progression","Différents terrains et scénarios, chacun avec son propre twist","Personnalisation du personnage et de l'équipe","Un arbitre non rémunéré en danger permanent"]},"media":{"title":"Médias","videos":"Vidéos","screenshots":"Captures d'écran","download":"télécharger le press kit en .rar","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Aperçu gameplay de basket en première personne basé sur la physique.","label":"Regarder sur YouTube"},{"title":"Reveal Trailer","description":"Bientôt disponible.","label":"Bientôt disponible"}]},"branding":{"title":"Identité visuelle","download":"télécharger les logos en .zip"},"links":{"title":"Liens"},"team":{"title":"Équipe","about_title":"À propos de Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"À propos","boilerplate":"Un petit studio indépendant de jeux vidéo basé à Berlin.
Nous sommes Katapult Games et nous créons des jeux avec notre communauté, pas seulement pour elle. Portés par la transparence, la flexibilité et l'amour des tendances actuelles du jeu vidéo, notre mission est de créer des expériences multijoueur énergiques qui connectent vraiment les joueurs. Nous ne voulons pas seulement que vous jouiez à nos jeux : nous voulons que vous nous aidiez à les façonner. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Équipe","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Contact","email":"Email","bug_reports":"Signaler un bug"}}},"pt":{"description":{"heading":"O QUE É SQUAD DUNK?","short":{"title":"DESCRIÇÃO CURTA","text":"Squad Dunk é um jogo de basquete em primeira pessoa baseado em física. Junte-se a amigos para partidas casuais ou competitivas. Sem mira automática. Cada jogada, boa ou terrível, é sua. Pronto para deixar o basquete mais físico?"},"long":{"title":"DESCRIÇÃO LONGA","paragraphs":["Squad Dunk é basquete construído ao redor da física. Cada jogador controla um personagem na quadra e joga com amigos em partidas online casuais ou competitivas, em quadras com seus próprios twists. Sem mira automática: cada jogada, boa ou terrível, é sua."]},"keyFeaturesTitle":"Principais recursos","keyFeatures":[{"icon":"","title":"JOGUE DE DENTRO DA QUADRA","body":"Controle um jogador em primeira pessoa e viva a partida de dentro da ação, não a partir de uma câmera distante."},{"icon":"","title":"SINTA A FÍSICA","body":"Squad Dunk usa mecânicas baseadas em física para tornar o basquete mais vivo, físico e imprevisível. Bloqueios, arremessos, roubadas, rebotes, movimento e contato fazem parte de cada momento."},{"icon":"","title":"JOGUE EM EQUIPE","body":"Jogue sozinho ou com amigos em partidas casuais ou competitivas. Trabalhem juntos e transformem ideias questionáveis em jogadas reais."},{"icon":"","title":"CADA QUADRA MUDA O JOGO","body":"Cada quadra traz seu próprio twist, com mecânicas e ambientes que fazem as equipes se adaptarem de formas diferentes."},{"icon":"","title":"PERSONALIZE SEU PERSONAGEM","body":"Crie seu visual, construa a identidade do seu squad e dê um estilo próprio ao seu time."}]},"ui":{"landing":{"nav":{"home":"Início","about":"Sobre","press":"Imprensa"},"eyebrow":"Vídeo de gameplay","tagline":"Basquete em primeira pessoa baseado em física. Sem mira automática. Cada jogada é sua.","play":"Assistir ao gameplay reel","close":"Fechar vídeo","fallback":"Abrir no YouTube","press_kit_cta":"Press Kit"},"nav":{"language":"Idioma","menu":"Menu","sections":{"factsheet":"Ficha técnica","description":"Descrição","features":"Recursos","media":"Mídia","branding":"Identidade visual","links":"Links","team":"Equipe","contact":"Contato"}},"factsheet":{"title":"Ficha técnica","labels":{"about":"Sobre:","developer":"Desenvolvedor:","development":"Desenvolvimento:","developers":"Desenvolvedores:","publisher":"Publisher:","release_date":"Data de lançamento:","genres":"Gêneros:","platforms":"Plataformas:","cost":"Preço:","steam":"Steam:","trailer":"Trailer:","preview":"Pre-view:","press_kit":"Press Kit:","website":"Site:"},"values":{"about":"Squad Dunk","development":"Em desenvolvimento ativo pela Katapult Games.","developers":"Bruno Braghetto, Matias Nicolini e Anahi Mou","based_in":"Baseado em Berlim, Alemanha","publisher":"TBA","cost":"TBA","steam":"https://store.steampowered.com/app/4591520/Squad_Dunk/","trailer":"TBA","preview":"https://youtu.be/D1QhwKqHKwI","press_kit":"Abrir Press Kit"},"release_dates":["TBA"],"genres_items":["Basquete","Esportes","Multiplayer","PvP","Primeira pessoa","Arcade","Física","Baseado em equipe","Indie","Primeira pessoa","Baseado em física","PvP online"],"platforms_items":["PC - Steam"]},"features":{"title":"Recursos","items":["Visão em primeira pessoa","Arremessos, passes, roubadas e rebotes baseados em física","Até 3 jogadores por equipe","Simples de começar, com muito espaço para melhorar","Diferentes quadras e cenários, cada um com seu próprio twist","Personalização de personagem e equipe","Um árbitro não remunerado em perigo constante"]},"media":{"title":"Mídia","videos":"Vídeos","screenshots":"Capturas de tela","download":"baixar press kit em .rar","video_cards":[{"title":"Pre-view","description":"Prévia de gameplay de basquete em primeira pessoa baseado em física.","label":"Assistir no YouTube"},{"title":"Reveal Trailer","description":"Em breve.","label":"Em breve"}]},"branding":{"title":"Identidade visual","download":"baixar logos em .zip"},"links":{"title":"Links"},"team":{"title":"Equipe","about_title":"Sobre a Katapult Games","boilerplate_title":"Sobre","boilerplate":"Um pequeno estúdio indie de videogames baseado em Berlim.
Somos a Katapult Games e criamos jogos com a nossa comunidade, não apenas para ela. Movidos por transparência, flexibilidade e amor pelas tendências modernas de games, nossa missão é criar experiências multiplayer de alta energia que realmente conectem jogadores. Não queremos apenas que você jogue nossos jogos: queremos que ajude a moldá-los. Welcome to the squad!","credits_title":"Equipe","credits":"Katapult Games"},"contact":{"title":"Contato","email":"Email","bug_reports":"Reportar bugs"}}}}}

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 01
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk first-person basketball gameplay screenshot.

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 02
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk multiplayer basketball gameplay screenshot.

manifest-screenshot.title: Gameplay screenshot 03
manifest-screenshot.alt: Squad Dunk physics-based basketball gameplay screenshot.

team.boilerplate: A small indie video game studio based in Berlin. We are Katapult Games and we build games with our community, not just for them. Driven by transparency, flexibility and a love for modern gaming trends, our mission is to create high energy multiplayer experiences that truly connect with players. We don't just want you to play our games, we want you to help us shape them. Welcome to the squad!
